name: Mega Wet Cat Food Bundle | Bonnie Pouch 0.1kg - 100 Pouches
shortDescription: SET of 100, 100g pouches FOR ONLY KSh 5,000/- + FREE Delivery (wihtin Nariobi Only). Flat rate delivery fee of 400/- for delivery outside of Nairobi. SAVE 55% – CHOOSE among 5 DELICIOUS FLAVOURS. While supplies last – this bundle is going fast! Enough for 1 month's supply for 1 cat (3 pouches per day for avg 4kg adult cat).
description: MEGA Wet Cat Food Bundle - SET OF 100 Bonnie Pouches. Fully-balanced, wet cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4,5 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin E (Min) - 15 mg/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 250 IU/kg Copper - 1 mg/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Biotin - 20 μg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (5%), minerals, inulin (0.1%).
